---
title: "Bioinformatic HW"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-12"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(anndata)
library(SPARK)
library(dplyr)
easydata <- read_h5ad("/sim_easy.h5ad")
mediumdata<- read_h5ad("/sim_medium.h5ad")
harddata<- read_h5ad("/sim_hard.h5ad")
dim(easydata)
dim(mediumdata)
dim(harddata)
counts1 <- as.matrix(easydata$X)
coords1 <- easydata$obsm[["spatial"]]

counts2 <- as.matrix(mediumdata$X)
coords2 <- mediumdata$obsm[["spatial"]]

counts3 <- as.matrix(harddata$X)
coords3 <- harddata$obsm[["spatial"]]

```


```{r}
datasets <- list(
  easy   = list(counts = counts1, coords = coords1),
  medium = list(counts = counts2, coords = coords2),
  hard   = list(counts = counts3, coords = coords3)
)

results <- lapply(names(datasets), function(name) {
  counts_filtered <- datasets[[name]]$counts[, colSums(datasets[[name]]$counts > 0) >= 10]
  
  res <- sparkx(
    count_in = t(counts_filtered),
    locus_in = datasets[[name]]$coords,
    numCores = 1,
    option = "mixture",
    verbose = TRUE
  )
  
  all_res <- res$res_mtest %>% arrange(adjustedPval)
  write.csv(all_res,        paste0("sparkx_all_",   name, ".csv"))
  write.csv(head(all_res, 10), paste0("sparkx_top10_", name, ".csv"))
  
  cat("===", name, "- SVG count:", nrow(all_res[all_res$adjustedPval < 0.05, ]), "===\n")
  print(head(all_res, 10))
  
  return(all_res)
})

names(results) <- names(datasets)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

plot_spatial <- function(coords, counts, gene_name, title) {
  df <- data.frame(
    x = coords[,1],
    y = coords[,2],
    expr = counts[, gene_name]
  )
  ggplot(df, aes(x, y, color=expr)) +
    geom_point(size=0.5) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
    ggtitle(paste(title, "-", gene_name)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))
}

top_genes1 <- rownames(svg1[order(svg1$adjustedPval), ])[1:6]
top_genes2 <- rownames(svg2[order(svg2$adjustedPval), ])[1:6]
top_genes3 <- rownames(svg3[order(svg3$adjustedPval), ])[1:6]

plots1 <- lapply(top_genes1, function(g) plot_spatial(coords1, counts1_filtered, g, "Easy"))
plots2 <- lapply(top_genes2, function(g) plot_spatial(coords2, counts2_filtered, g, "Medium"))
plots3 <- lapply(top_genes3, function(g) plot_spatial(coords3, counts3_filtered, g, "Hard"))

# export
save_grid <- function(plots, filename, title) {
  p <- arrangeGrob(grobs=plots, ncol=3, top=title)
  ggsave(filename, plot=p, width=15, height=10, dpi=300)
  message("Saved: ", filename)
}

save_grid(plots1, "spatial_easy.png",   "Easy Dataset - Top 6 SVGs")
save_grid(plots2, "spatial_medium.png", "Medium Dataset - Top 6 SVGs")
save_grid(plots3, "spatial_hard.png",   "Hard Dataset - Top 6 SVGs")
```

```{r}
realdata<- read_h5ad("/Users/liannechen/Downloads/h5ad/2024_xenium_breast_tTMA1.h5ad")
# Subset to core 168
idx <- which(realdata$obs$core == 168)
counts_real <- as.matrix(realdata$X)[idx, ]
coords_real <- realdata$obsm[["spatial"]][idx, ]

# Filter genes expressed in at least 10 cells
counts_real_filtered <- counts_real[, colSums(counts_real > 0) >= 10]

# Run SPARKX
sparkx_real <- sparkx(
  count_in = t(counts_real_filtered),
  locus_in = coords_real,
  numCores = 1,
  option = "mixture",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Extract SVG results
all_results_real <- sparkx_real$res_mtest %>% arrange(adjustedPval)
svg_real <- all_results_real[all_results_real$adjustedPval < 0.05, ]
cat("SVG count:", nrow(svg_real), "\n")

# Save tables
write.csv(all_results_real,           "sparkx_all_real_core168.csv")
write.csv(head(all_results_real, 10), "sparkx_top10_real_core168.csv")

# Spatial expression plot function
plot_spatial <- function(coords, counts, gene_name, title) {
  df <- data.frame(x = coords[,1], y = coords[,2], expr = counts[, gene_name])
  ggplot(df, aes(x, y, color=expr)) +
    geom_point(size=0.5) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma") +
    ggtitle(paste(title, "-", gene_name)) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))
}

# Plot top 6 SVGs and export
top_genes_real <- rownames(all_results_real)[1:6]
plots_real <- lapply(top_genes_real, function(g) plot_spatial(coords_real, counts_real_filtered, g, "Core 168"))

p <- arrangeGrob(grobs=plots_real, ncol=3, top="Real Data Core 168 - Top 6 SVGs")
ggsave("spatial_real_core168.png", plot=p, width=15, height=10, dpi=300)
message("Saved: spatial_real_core168.png")
```
